prompt: Offer a prayer for inventory stocktaking
prayer: Omnissiah, grant us clarity in this dark hour. Let the accounting-spirits reveal each component's resting place, that no sacred resource be lost to the void of ignorance.
Blessed be the stored energies. Release now the accumulated potentia, that the charge-spirits depart in orderly procession and the banks be made clean.
By the Machine Spirit's whisper, align the resonance-nodes. Let all frequencies find their sacred channel, that our voices carry true across the void.
Omnissiah, steady the needle's trembling hand. Grant this measuring-soul the wisdom to speak truth, that we may know the vessel's burden with absolute certainty.

prompt: Emergency rite for gear meshing check
prayer: Swift Omnissiah! Let the teeth engage in perfect synchronicity. Drive out the grinding demons, that gears turn as one sacred mechanism.
Blessed fluid-bearer, rouse yourself! Let pressure return to your chambers, that the vital essences flow again through arterial conduits.
Unveil the heat-spirits hidden from mortal sight. Grant this eye-that-sees-warmth the clarity to pierce shadow and reveal the enemy's fire-signature.

prompt: Can you bless this packaging servitor programming
prayer: Machine Spirit of the mechanical hand, accept these new commandments. Let your servo-logic embrace the stacking-ritual, that cargo be secured in the Omnissiah's order.
Purge the corrupted signals, cast down the interference-demons. Let our transmissions break free from the enemy's silencing grasp, restored to the Omnissiah's clarity.
Blessed be the breach-chambers and the payload-spirits within. Guide each round to its nest with reverence, that the gun-soul be fully armed and righteous.
